description: Pari Lingampalli, Lead Product Manager at PayPal, discusses PyUSD on Solana, highlighting its benefits such as near-instant global settlements and low-cost transactions. Elon Gitter from Paxos explains how to work with PyUSD and demonstrates a Rust program for sending tokens to multiple addresses using the Anchor framework.
topic_summary: Overview of PyUSD on Solana, its integration with PayPal, and a technical demonstration of a token transfer program using Rust and the Anchor framework [t=7:52-370:07].
